name: @evalops/contracts
description: Shared Maestro contracts for frontend/backend integration

scripts.build: node ../../scripts/headless-protocol-codegen.mjs && (cd ../.. && bun run generate:headless-proto:buf) && node ../../scripts/clean-paths.js dist ../../tmp/tsbuildinfo/contracts.tsbuildinfo && node ../../scripts/ensure-dir.js ../../tmp/tsbuildinfo && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.dev: node ../../scripts/headless-protocol-codegen.mjs && (cd ../.. && bun run generate:headless-proto:buf) && node ../../scripts/ensure-dir.js ../../tmp/tsbuildinfo && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput

author: EvalOps
